final_text:
{
  "project_name": "Hospitable Management System",
  "backend_architecture": "Microservices architecture using Node.js for the backend, PostgreSQL for the database, and Docker for containerization.",
  "services": ["User Management Service", "Booking System Service", "Payment Gateway Service"],
  "controllers": ["UserController", "RoomController", "BookingController", "PaymentController"],
  "entities": ["User", "Room", "Booking", "Payment"],
  "repositories": ["UserRepository", "RoomRepository", "BookingRepository", "PaymentRepository"],
  "apis": [
    "/api/users",
    "/api/rooms",
    "/api/bookings",
    "/api/payments",
    "/api/auth/login",
    "/api/auth/register"
  ],
  "validation_rules": [
    "User registration validation",
    "Room booking validation",
    "Payment processing validation"
  ],
  "security_implementation": [
    "OAuth2 for authentication",
    "HTTPS for secure communication",
    "Encryption for sensitive data"
  ],
  "error_handling": [
    "Global error handling middleware",
    "Custom error messages for API responses"
  ],
  "developer_notes": [
    "Use Docker for local development and deployment",
    "Follow RESTful API design principles",
    "Implement unit tests for each service"
  ]
}
